$comment: IMMUTABLE feature list (see SPEC.md). The v1 entries (S0-S6) and any released slice may never be reworded or reordered; a new SPEC.md slice may APPEND entries (S7+ added for v0.2). The ONLY field a work session may change is `passes` (false -> true, after the check is demonstrated, never asserted). Log evidence in dev/progress.txt.

features.check: claude plugin validate . exits 0 with no errors (--strict deferred to first public release, when semver is added; --strict escalates the intentional no-version-field choice into an error)

features.description: Plugin loads from a local dir and exposes its skills
features.check: claude --plugin-dir . loads without error and lists ai-data-security skills

features.description: Orchestrator skill invokes a context:fork worker skill and receives its return
features.check: /ai-data-security:security-audit (stub) invokes the forked ai-config-audit stub and echoes AI-DATA-SECURITY-STUB lines for both skills

features.description: Shared finding schema, citations registry, and check map exist and are consistent
features.check: reference/finding-format.md, reference/citations.yml, reference/checks.yml exist; every checks.yml entry references only citation keys present in citations.yml and at least one fixture id; validated by dev/validate.sh

features.description: secrets-scanner produces exactly the expected, citation-conformant findings on the generated fixture
features.check: tests/fixtures/make-secrets-repo.sh && /ai-data-security:secrets-scanner <generated repo> -> 1 history-only HIGH + 1 worktree .env CRITICAL (no deny rule), each finding conformant to finding-format.md with a citations.yml citation

features.description: CI runs deterministic checks including gitleaks self-scan of tree and full history
features.check: .github/workflows/ci.yml green on push: plugin validation (or jq fallback), shellcheck, gitleaks self-scan

features.description: ai-config-audit produces the expected findings on the ai-config fixture
features.check: /ai-data-security:ai-config-audit tests/fixtures/ai-config -> findings: 3 missing secret deny rules, dangerous env-runner allow rule, inline MCP credential, transcript-retention INFO, consumer-retention UNKNOWN with manual-check instructions; deterministic verdicts from scripts/permeval.py

features.description: data-classification lands fixture files in four distinct tiers with evidence and no sampled values
features.check: /ai-data-security:data-classification tests/fixtures/classify-repo -> 4 files in 4 distinct tiers, Restricted file yields HIGH, report contains no sampled data values, nothing auto-assigned Public

features.description: db-access-audit Postgres pack verified against dockerized fixture; human gate works
features.check: docker Postgres + tests/fixtures/postgres/init.sql; every skills/db-access-audit/sql/postgres/*.sql output diffs clean against tests/fixtures/postgres/expected/; skill shows connection target + SQL and waits for confirmation before executing; reports over-broad grant, PII columns, no masked views, no audit logging

features.description: db-access-audit Snowflake pack interprets recorded fixtures into expected findings
features.check: skill maps tests/fixtures/snowflake/ recorded outputs to the findings in tests/fixtures/snowflake/expected_findings.md without a live account; CI lint proves zero mutating statements in both SQL packs

features.description: security-audit orchestrator produces one merged, deduped, cited report end-to-end
features.check: /ai-data-security:security-audit over combined fixtures -> single report with all 4 sub-audit sections, deduplicated .env finding, Top-5 actions ordered severity-first with rotate-pushed-secrets override, every finding cited

features.description: README/SECURITY/CONTRIBUTING complete; real install path works; repo provably clean
features.check: claude plugin marketplace add kyle-chalmers/ai-data-security && claude plugin install ai-data-security@ai-data-security succeeds from a clean checkout; gitleaks tree+history self-scan clean; CI green

features.description: Optional .ai-data-security.yml org profile: extends-only tokens/defaults/citations, fail-closed when unparseable, zero-config behavior unchanged
features.check: run-fixture-checks.sh 'org profile' step green: org tokens raise floors and appear in evidence, org citations append to matching checks only, unparseable profile -> DC-03 with extensions NOT applied, and org-only names are NOT flagged without the profile

features.description: PII column patterns match at token boundaries in classify_hints and both SQL packs (member_ssn/customer_email match; emailed_at does not)
features.check: run-fixture-checks.sh token-boundary assertion green; postgres fixture gains member_ssn/customer_email/emailed_at with a hand-verified golden pii_columns.csv, diffed live by the docker pack in CI (tests/postgres-fixture-check.sh)

features.description: eval_grants.py --dialect snowflake parses recorded snow-sql outputs and computes DB-01..DB-05 deterministically (scripts decide, model narrates, both dialects)
features.check: run-fixture-checks.sh snowflake step green: verdicts match tests/fixtures/snowflake/expected_findings.md exactly (incl. DB-05 probable cap), unconfirmed principal caps at MEDIUM + DB-06, garbage recorded output fails closed to DB-06
